title: Classic Improvements ADD ON 6 Glowing ores
description: This adds glowing ores into the game so its easier to mine!
body:
# CLASSIC IMPROVEMENTS ADD ON 6 Glowing ores

### IF YOUR LOOKING FOR CLASSIC IMPROVEMENTS [HERE]()

## What this does 

This makes all ores glow so mining becomes easier but the ores glow with Emissives and does not produce it own light like light levels

This makes all ores glow even coal!

## NOTES 

THIS REQURES CONTINUITY OR OPTIFINE 

THIS MADE FOR PROGRAMMER ART 

THIS HAS NO MODDED ORES ADDED

## DOWNLOADS

[CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

[OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads)

[CLASSSIC IMPROVEMENTS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)
